The objection is that the company
maintains this mean average for a
greater period of the year than
nature would.


The city of Spokane ran it's water
plant from the average power de-
rived from the river before the W.
w. p. Co. built its dam, but then
the plant was much smaller than
1t is at the present. Now the limit
of possible power to be developed
by the present city dam has been
reached, and this power. 1t is charg-
ed, would be reduced 60 per cent
in the season of low water If the
storing of the water by the Wash
ington Water Power Co. was order
ed discontinued.
